news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态TVL本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长，DeFiLlama数据显示。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked in DeFi rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume from new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条主流公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议（CCIP）宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，目标降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing transaction fees for small transfers.
